articles.title: Coal linkage auctions: Coal India steps up supply to non-regulated sector, offers record volumes
articles.description: Coal India Limited is introducing new measures to increase coal supply for non-regulated sector consumers. This aims to reduce import dependence on high gross calorific value coal and meet growing industrial needs. Record coal will be offered in linkage auctions targeting the sponge iron sector. Steel producers gain flexibility to sell coal byproducts. New projects can secure coal linkages before commissioning.

articles.title: RBI flags rising domestic inflation risks as global energy shock begins feeding into prices
BHEL shares jump over 2% on bagging Rs 21,000 crore power project order
articles.description: The contract covers the engineering, procurement and construction (EPC) package, including design, engineering, manufacturing, supply, construction, erection, testing and commissioning works.

articles.title: RBI holds repo rate at 5.25%: What it means for home loan borrowers and homebuyers
articles.description: The RBI has kept the repo rate unchanged at 5.25% for the fourth consecutive MPC meeting, ensuring that home loan borrowers continue to benefit from lower borrowing costs. The decision is expected to support housing demand, improve affordability, and provide stability to both homebuyers and the real estate sector.

articles.title: Gas Prices Today, June 5: Check fuel latest rates in California, Texas, Florida, New York, and Pennsylvania as National Average sees a dip
articles.description: Gasoline prices nationwide have seen a welcome dip, with the average price of regular fuel dropping by 18 cents to $4.24 per gallon. This decline, attributed to crude oil staying below $100 a barrel, offers some relief for summer travelers. However, ongoing concerns about the Strait of Hormuz's reopening cast a shadow of uncertainty over future fuel costs.

articles.title: LIC buys Maruti Suzuki shares worth Rs 68 crore, insurer's stake in automaker crosses 5%
articles.description: Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) has increased its stake in Maruti Suzuki above the 5% threshold after purchasing 51,750 shares through a market transaction. The move comes amid a decline in Maruti Suzuki's stock this year and reflects LIC's continued investment activity despite market volatility.

articles.title: Hindustan Zinc Shares Sink 6% As Govt Weighs 2% Stake Sale Worth Up To Rs 5,000 Crore
articles.description: Hindustan Zinc shares fell nearly 6 percent as the government weighs selling up to a 2 percent stake, aiming to raise about Rs 5000 crore as part of its disinvestment drive

articles.title: 300 billion barrels: Venezuela has more oil than Saudi Arabia. Why did it collapse?
articles.description: Much of its reserves are located in the Orinoco Belt and consist of heavy crude. Unlike the lighter crude found in many Middle Eastern fields, heavy oil is more expensive and technically challenging to produce and refine.

articles.title: India GDP data today: Q4 growth likely above 7 per cent; FY27 outlook faces oil, global risks
articles.description: Economists expect India to remain the fastest-growing major economy, with Q4 FY26 growth estimates ranging between 7.1-7.3 per cent. However, projections indicate growth could moderate in FY27 amid geopolitical tensions and external uncertainties.

articles.title: Silver prices to remain under pressure unless oil price declines: Analyst
articles.description: In near-term, the metal is expected to be under pressure unless oil prices come down on sustainable basis

articles.title: Go Digit Insurance shares jump 9% after Rs 100 crore block deal attracts MFs, global investor
articles.description: Go Digit General Insurance shares saw a significant jump. This surge followed a Rs 100-crore block deal. Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund and JPMorgan Taiwan Eastern Technology Fund acquired shares. Peak XV Partners Growth Investments III was the seller.

articles.title: APTET June 2026 notification released, registration begins today at tet2dsc.apcfss.in, details here
articles.description: APTET June 2026 notification has been released. The registration process will begin today, June 5. The details can be checked here.

articles.title: Go Digit share price climbs 10% as institutional investors pick up stake
articles.description: According to reports, Aditya Birla Sunlife Mutual Fund has purchased 2.1 million shares of Digit General Insurance, while JPMorgan (Taiwan) Eastern Technology Fund also acquired 1.1 million shares.

articles.title: Green Buildings In India: Do They Really Save Money or Just Sell Hope?
articles.description: Green buildings in India collectively save around 64.3 billion units of energy every year.

articles.title: RBI lowers FY27 GDP forecast to 6.6%, sees inflation rising to 5.1% amid oil shock, global risks
articles.description: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra said West Asia tensions, elevated crude oil prices, supply chain disruptions, and weather risks have increased uncertainty around India’s growth and inflation outlook.

articles.title: RBI MPC: India's FY27 GDP growth projection revised downward to 6.6%
articles.description: The central bank unanimously kept the repo rate unchanged at 5.25 percent, maintaining the neutral stance.

articles.title: Govt Exempts FPIs From Capital Gains Tax On G-Secs: How It Will Impact Markets, Rupee And Investors
articles.description: The move comes as India seeks to attract foreign investors into the country and to deepen its bond market.

articles.title: How Britain’s ‘longest divorce’ battle ended with an Indian-origin woman winning Rs 85 crore
articles.description: Varsha Gohil, an Indian-origin woman, secured a 6.6 million pounds (around Rs 85 crore) payout after years of litigation over her husband's concealed £28 million (around Rs 360.06 crore) fortune. The 23-year divorce battle between an Indian-origin couple in the UK concluded after the court awarded Varsha millions and ruled that there would be no further appeals in the case

articles.title: RBI holds repo rate at 5.25%: What it means for your home loan repayment
articles.description: Repo rate pause keeps home loan EMIs steady as RBI balances inflation risks and growth concerns amid global uncertainty

articles.title: RBI increases FY27 inflation forecast by 50bps to 5.1% amid West Asia war
articles.description: The governor said the rate-setting panel decided to keep the core inflation projected at 4.7%, adding that underlying inflation pressure remain benign at this point.

articles.title: Company laid off techie with just 12 minutes farewell. A week later, they made a shocking discovery: ‘Nobody even knew...’
articles.description: A company laid off a senior engineer to save money. This engineer was the only one fixing critical system problems every night. After his departure, the payment service began to fail. Investigations revealed the engineer's hidden work. The incident highlights the risks of relying on a single individual for essential operations.

articles.title: Karnataka cabinet: What challenges await Shivakumar after succeeding Siddaramaiah?
articles.description: DK Shivakumar succeeds Siddaramaiah as Karnataka CM, facing cabinet balancing, welfare funding and major infrastructure challenges.

articles.title: RBI MPC Meeting 2026 Date and Time: When will Governor Sanjay Malhotra announce policy decision? Here's how to watch live streaming
articles.description: RBI MPC Meeting June 2026: All eyes are on the Reserve Bank of India today as Governor Sanjay Malhotra announces the Monetary Policy Committee's decision. This crucial announcement will reveal the central bank's stance on interest rates and inflation. Investors are keenly awaiting signals on economic growth and stability amidst global uncertainties. The outcome will guide market sentiment for the coming months.

articles.title: 'Confusion and communication gap': Rajesh Exports shares in focus after NSE, BSE clarification on SEBI order
articles.description: Rajesh Exports said the entire matter is a result of confusion and communication gap, which the company is in the process of addressing with SEBI.

articles.title: Who is Neelkanth Mishra, India's new executive director at World Bank?
articles.description: The veteran economist, currently serving on key government advisory bodies and leading economic research at Axis Bank, will represent India and three South Asian neighbours at the World Bank board

articles.title: Former NCT member Mark Lee launches his own label, Upper Room
articles.description: He will serve as co-CEO of the label, which will be producing content that integrates music with video, visual art and performance.

articles.title: Annamalai BJP Resignation Live Updates: Big Announcement Today At 12 PM Amid Resignation Buzz
articles.description: Annamalai BJP Resignation Live Updates: Despite the BJP's denial, reports claim Annamalai has already tendered his resignation.

articles.title: Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty signals tepid open ahead of RBI rate decision; Asia markets decline
articles.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates, June 5: The GIFT Nifty indicated that the Nifty50 may open on a tepid note before the Reserve Bank of India's rate decision

articles.title: ‘India is reliable partner’: Putin lauds India’s rate of development, announces $100 bn trade goal
articles.description: ‘India is reliable partner’: Putin lauds India’s rate of development, announces $100 bn trade goal

articles.title: Oil Price Today (June 5): Crude oil holds ground as Iran peace deal uncertainty lingers. Where are prices headed?
articles.description: Oil prices held steady on Friday following significant Thursday losses. Hopes for a quick resolution to the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran diminished after Hezbollah rejected a new ceasefire proposal. Despite this, both Brent and WTI crude benchmarks are on track for their first weekly gain in three weeks.

articles.title: ‘We will get to a deal’: Trump predicts imminent breakthrough for US-India trade agreement after blasting past tariff policies
articles.description: Donald Trump also referred to past trade imbalances, alleging that India had imposed high tariffs on American goods.

articles.title: India, UK launch initiatives for minerals, maritime cooperation
articles.description: India and the UK have launched a Critical Minerals Global Supply Chain Observatory and signed an MoU for a Regional Maritime Security Centre of Excellence during UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper's visit. The two nations also reviewed progress in trade, technology, and defense, aiming to strengthen their future-oriented partnership.

articles.title: Did this L&T-backed AI stock actually crash 90% in one day? Here's all you need to know
articles.description: E2E Networks appeared to plunge nearly 90% in a day after its 1:10 stock split took effect, but the move was purely a price adjustment. The AI-focused cloud computing company actually hit the 5% upper circuit post-split. Backed by L&T, the stock has surged over 127% in 2026 so far.

articles.title: Vedanta demerger: How will the mega restructuring impact dividend payouts for shareholders?
articles.description: Vedanta has completed a major demerger, splitting into four new companies. Investors are now assessing how this restructuring will affect the company's tradition of consistent dividend payouts. While Vedanta is expected to remain a dividend-paying entity, the absolute dividend per share may decrease. Shareholders will need to evaluate each demerged company individually for their income requirements and potential returns.

articles.title: US Stock Market: Private credit funds face fresh redemption test as investor withdrawals remain elevated
articles.description: Private credit funds catering to wealthy investors are coming under renewed pressure as redemption requests remain elevated in the second quarter. Early filings reviewed by Reuters indicate that concerns over software-sector exposure, asset valuations, and limited transparency are continuing to weigh on investor sentiment and fuel scrutiny of the fast-growing private credit market.

articles.title: BWSSB to set up Bengaluru Global Water Innovation Network
articles.description: BWSSB to set up Bengaluru Global Water Innovation Network

articles.title: 'He is a good friend of mine': Trump praises PM Modi, says US and India will get to a trade deal
articles.description: US President Donald Trump expressed optimism about reaching a trade agreement with India soon, stating that the previous trade imbalance has now reversed. Both nations have been engaged in constructive negotiations, aiming to finalize an interim trade pact while broader discussions continue. Despite ongoing talks, concerns remain regarding potential US tariffs on imports from several economies, including India.

articles.title: RBI MPC key takeaways: Here are the major announcements by Governor Sanjay Malhotra on GDP, inflation and repo rate
articles.description: RBI Monetary Policy 2026 Takeaways: In the previous MPC, the Reserve Bank of India has maintained its key repo rate at 5.25 percent. The central bank also kept its policy stance neutral. This decision comes as India navigates a weaker rupee and aims to support economic growth. The RBI has projected GDP growth for FY26 and FY27. Inflation forecasts have also been provided for the coming quarters.

articles.title: Asian stocks poised to edge lower, oil steadies
Silver prices tank Rs 5,700/kg, gold down Rs 1,300/10 gm as Iran war uncertainty stokes inflation worries. Time to sell?
articles.description: Gold and silver prices saw a sharp decline on the Multi Commodity Exchange on Friday. Renewed Middle East tensions and inflation worries weighed on market sentiment. MCX silver futures for July 2026 delivery dropped significantly, as did gold futures for August 2026 delivery.

articles.title: Karnataka CM DK Shivakumar Allocates Portfolios To Newly Sworn-in Cabinet, Keeps Finance
articles.description: Karnataka Chief Minister DK Shivakumar has allocated portfolios to his newly sworn-in Cabinet, keeping finance and personnel departments for himself while distributing key ministries to senior colleagues.

articles.title: Secure Some Extra Storage With These Early Amazon Prime SSD and HDD Deals
articles.description: Amazon Prime Day isn't for a few weeks, but we've found some early deals on what has turned out to be the most sought after sale items of the year in tech: simple storage space.

articles.title: PM rooftop solar scheme set for 7.5 million milestone
articles.description: India's PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana is set to reach over 7.5 million homes by year-end, with 4 million already benefiting. The scheme, launched in February 2024, aims to boost rooftop solar adoption, especially for families using 1-3 kW of electricity. Over 6.5 million applications are in the pipeline, indicating strong public interest and momentum.

articles.title: Ola Electric’s QIP boost; AMFI benches Stable Money
articles.description: Happy Friday! Ola Electric has raised fresh capital through a QIP. This and more in today's ETtech Morning Dispatch.

articles.title: Finance minister, mayor inspect city wards
articles.description: UP finance minister Suresh Khanna inspected four Lucknow Zone-4 wards, ordering encroachment removal, plot cleaning, better parking and drain completion by June 19.

articles.title: ​Circle rates surge in villages along expressway corridor in Lucknow
articles.description: ​Circle rates surge in villages along expressway corridor in Lucknow

articles.title: Rajesh Exports likely to lose PLI beneficiary status, face MCA probe
articles.description: Rajesh Exports faces potential removal from a government battery production incentive scheme. The corporate affairs ministry is considering a probe into the company's financial reporting. This follows a Securities and Exchange Board of India order flagging significant overstatement of revenues. The company's chairman stated no official communication has been received yet. The situation is developing rapidly.

articles.title: LDA to launch 3 residential schemes in June
articles.description: Lucknow Development Authority to launch Naimish Nagar, Varun Vihar and Wellness City housing schemes in June; registrations, lottery allotments and rates announced.
